speaker: charlie
text: That's a wrap on today's Bright Side bulletin. From plastic-eating enzymes to underdog victories, it's been a cracking day for human ingenuity and sporting heart.

speaker: alice
text: Tomorrow we'll have more brilliant breakthroughs, more reasons to smile, and Sam will keep us posted on our gorgeous autumn weather. Keep being curious, keep being optimistic.

speaker: charlie
text: From all of us here at ParkSyde, thanks for choosing the bright side. We'll catch you tomorrow for another dose of everything that's going right in our amazing world.

speaker: alice
text: Until then, keep looking up, keep looking forward, and remember that somewhere out there, someone's solving tomorrow's problems today.

speaker: charlie
text: See ya tomorrow, Queensland. Stay bright.
